---
title: "Feng Cheng"
toc: false
---

fecheng at uw dot edu

## Education

University of Washington, Ph.D. in Mathematics (September 2024 – present)

University of California, Berkeley, B.A. in Mathematics and in Statistics (August 2022 – May 2024)

University of California, Davis (September 2020 – June 2022)

## Awards & Scholarships

Lee McFarlan Fellowship Award (2024 – 2026)

Robert Lewis Wasser Memorial Scholarship (2022)

G. Thomas Sallee Prize (2021)

<!-- ## Teaching Material -->

<!-- Calculus (forthcoming) -->
